channel.title: ViralDeals - Electronics Picks
channel.description: Curated trending electronics picks from Amazon India.

item.title: Must-have Portable Charger for Summer 📈
item.description: Stay charged on-the-go with this Xiaomi Power Bank 4i 20000mAh, which offers super-fast 33W charging and triple output ports for multiple devices. Its 12-layer protection ensures safe use, and the Type-C input & output make it easy to recharge. Perfect for summer adventures, long commutes, or office use, this portable charger is a must-have for anyone who needs to stay powered up.
